text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both flat to slightly positive on the day, with neither major showing conviction while altcoins like SOL and BNB outpace them, signaling selective risk appetite despite extreme fear conditions. The Fear & Greed index at 23 reflects capitulation sentiment, though the 5-point weekly rise suggests some stabilization after deeper losses. Bitcoin dominance at 56.2% and subdued $46B volume indicate traders are neither panic-selling nor aggressively accumulating—a cautious, wait-and-see posture ahead of potential catalysts.
